docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,935.00 FILED BY MAUMER, GEORGE A. AS TO DEFENDANT BAN CAL PROPERTY MANAGMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-31-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY TAMMY MCNAUGHT--PRESIDENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAUMER, GEORGE A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BAN CAL PROPERTY MANAGMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
